home.feature1Desc: From Gladiator Tacos to Samurai Sushi, choose your edible avatar.
home.feature2Desc: Use secret spices and salty traps to sabotage your rivals' flavors.
home.feature3Desc: Outlast the competition to become the Supreme Snack.
home.footerCopy: © {year} The Last of the Snacks. All rights reserved. Do not swallow the game pieces.

arenas.heroDesc: Choose your kitchen and prepare for the ultimate food fight! Only the crispiest survive.
arenas.searchPlaceholder: Enter Room Name or Secret Code...
arenas.noPublicRooms: No public rooms available to join.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.subtitle: Master the art of culinary combat. Outlast, outclever, and outlive your snack rivals.
howToPlay.section1Copy: In this fast-paced tabletop battle, you are a snack with feelings—and a grudge. Your objective is simple: eliminate everyone else before they devour you.
howToPlay.actionAttackDesc: Target a player to remove one of their 'Freshness' tokens. Crunch!
howToPlay.actionDefendDesc: Play out of turn to block an incoming bite. Stay crispy for another round.
howToPlay.actionStealDesc: Draw as many cards as you can. The buffet is open—first come, first crumb!
howToPlay.actionPeekDesc: Find out your adversary's secret identity. Knowledge is delicious.
howToPlay.secretCopy: Every character has a unique Weakness Card. If an opponent plays your specific weakness card against you, you lose double freshness.
howToPlay.characterPizzaQuote: "Cold? Please. I'm always cool." *nervously* "Just... no freezers."
howToPlay.characterSushiQuote: "Heat? No problem." *sweating* "Is it hot in here?"
howToPlay.section4RoundsCopy: A match consists of 3 rounds. Round winner: the last snack standing wins. If more than one snack is standing when the round ends, the one with more Snack Points wins. Match winner: after 3 rounds, the player with the most total Snack Points wins the game.
howToPlay.section4TurnCopy: On your turn: (1) Draw a card from the deck — you must draw before playing. (2) Play one card from your hand — attack, defend, peek, or use a special action. (3) End your turn. Play passes clockwise. You can play Defend cards out of turn when you're targeted.
howToPlay.section4PointsCopy: Snack Points decide round and match winners. You earn: 50 base points, +10 per opponent eliminated, +1 per 10 seconds survived, and +20 for being the last snack standing in the round. Round winner: last snack standing, or highest points if multiple remain. Match winner: highest total Snack Points after 3 rounds.
howToPlay.footerCopy: © {year} The Last of the Snacks. All calories included.

lobby.title: Kitchen Lobby
lobby.suspicionMeterDescBody: After each turn, players vote: "Who looks overcooked?" Top voted player gains 1 Suspicion token. 3 tokens = automatic public reveal of category.
lobby.waitingForPlayers1: We still need {count} snacks more to fight for their lives.
lobby.waitingForPlayers2: {count} more hungry snacks and we're good to go!
lobby.waitingForPlayers4: Waiting for {count} more snacks to join the battle…
lobby.waitingForPlayers5: Gather {count} more snacks and the feast can begin!
lobby.waitingForHost1: The chef needs to hurry up or the dish will be burned!
lobby.waitingForHost2: Host, start the game before we get cold!
lobby.waitingForHost4: All snacks present—waiting for the host to fire up the oven!
lobby.waitingForHost5: We're all in. The host holds the start button!
lobby.kickPlayerTitle: Remove this player from the room
lobby.arenaClosesIn: Arena closes in {time} if game isn't started

connectionLost.crisisCopy: The milk has spilled! We lost your signal in the kitchen chaos. Don't let your snacks get cold!
connectionLost.kicked: You were removed from the room by the host.
connectionLost.roomClosed: This room was closed by the host.
connectionLost.roomClosedTimeout: This arena was closed because the game was not started in time.
connectionLost.findAnotherGameInvite: Find a new arena and jump back into the snack battle!
connectionLost.notFoundCopy: That room code has expired or never existed. Check your spelling, chef! A single typo can ruin the whole recipe.
connectionLost.codeHint: Common codes look like: BREAD-42, CHIP-X9, SODA-01
connectionLost.footerCopy: © {year} The Last of the Snacks. All crumbs reserved.

gameEnd.playAgainTitleHostOnly: Only the host can start again
gameEnd.shareTextFinal: I just finished a game of The Last of the Snacks!

assigning.subtitle: THE HEAT IS RISING IN THE KITCHEN
assigning.flavorText: Defend your crumbs at all costs.

eliminationModal.title: ELIMINATED!
eliminationModal.copyBody: The heat was too much for this snack. The kitchen has claimed another victim. You're out—but you can still watch and chat!

microwave.title: Microwave
microwave.action: Target a player. If heat is their weakness → eliminated

freeze.title: Freeze
freeze.action: Target a player. If cold is their weakness → eliminated

salt.title: Salt
salt.action: Reveal Sweet or Savory of a player

double_salt.title: Double Salt
double_salt.action: Target a player. If it's Donut → eliminated

shake.title: Shake
shake.action: Target a player. If it's Taco → eliminated

steam.title: Steam
steam.action: Target a player. If it's Fries → eliminated

spoil.title: Spoil
spoil.action: Target a player. If it's Burger → eliminated

foil_wrap.title: Foil Wrap
foil_wrap.action: Blocks the next attack on you. Cannot be played from hand.

gameTable.endTurnTitle: Play a card to take your turn, or wait for the timer
gameTable.drawCardPrompt: Drag from deck to your hand or double-click to draw
gameTable.dragDeckHere: Drag a card from the deck here
gameTable.eliminationFlavorFreeze: "Frozen solid. The cold never bothered them... until now."
gameTable.eliminationFlavorShake: "Shaken to pieces. Shaken, not stirred... to death."
gameTable.eliminationFlavorSteam: "Steamed to sogginess. Another fry bites the dust."

settingsHelp.title: Settings and Help
settingsHelp.rule1: Join or create a room. Share the 8-character code so friends can join.
settingsHelp.rule2: Everyone gets a secret snack identity. Don't reveal it—others will try to eliminate you.
settingsHelp.rule3: On your turn, play a card from your hand. Cards can target others or protect you.
settingsHelp.rule4: If your weakness is triggered, you're eliminated. Last snack standing wins.
settingsHelp.rule5: Use the kitchen chat to bluff, accuse, or stay quiet. Defend your crumbs!
settingsHelp.viewFullGuide: View full How to Play guide
settingsHelp.leaveConfirm: Leave game? You'll need the room code to rejoin.

lobbyLoading.tip1: Every snack has a unique weakness. If an opponent plays your weakness card against you, you're eliminated instantly.
lobbyLoading.tip2: Microwave eliminates snacks weak to heat. Freeze eliminates snacks weak to cold.
lobbyLoading.tip3: Salt reveals whether a player is Sweet or Savory. Use it to discover identities.
lobbyLoading.tip4: Double Salt eliminates Donut instantly. Shake eliminates Taco. Spoil eliminates Burger.
lobbyLoading.tip5: Peek lets you privately view someone's snack. Use it wisely!
lobbyLoading.tip6: Foil Wrap blocks one attack. Save it for when you're in danger.
lobbyLoading.tip7: Trade Seats swaps two players' identities secretly. Use it to confuse everyone!
lobbyLoading.tip8: Buffet makes everyone draw 1 extra card. Use it when you need more options.
lobbyLoading.tip9: Trash discards 2 cards from your hand. Use it to get rid of useless cards.
lobbyLoading.tip10: Use the kitchen chat to bluff, accuse, or stay quiet. Confusion is your ally.
